steps.t: Cliving is in the Norcrofts, to the north-west of Elthengels. Thane Mildrith of Elthengels is suspicious of Reeve Athelward of Cliving, who took her d…
Reeve Athelward is in the Mead Hall of Cliving. Thane Mildrith wants you to ensure that her daughter Siflád is not being mistreated. The first step is…
Siflád is somewhere in Cliving. Athelward has given you permission to speak to Siflád, his ward.
Cuthred, the captain of the guard, is by a guard tower in Cliving, west of the Mead Hall. Reeve Athelward wanted you to help the captain of his guard …
